HomePage.title: Stop Uploading Your Life.
HomePage.subtitle: Next-Gen Local Privacy
HomePage.description: The digital world leaks. VaultNode doesn't. Process, redact, and merge your most sensitive documents 100% inside your browser's RAM. No servers. No traces.

toolDescriptions.compress: Shrink images with zero quality loss.
toolDescriptions.heic: Convert iPhone HEIC to JPG locally.
toolDescriptions.mediaConverter: Extract audio or trim video clips.
toolDescriptions.svgToPng: Rasterize vector SVGs to PNG pixels.
toolDescriptions.pdfToWord: Turn PDFs into editable Word files.

cta.title: Ready to take back your privacy?
cta.desc: Join thousands of users processing sensitive data where it belongs: in their own hands.

HomePage.mergeDropDesc: Select multiple PDFs to merge in your session.

howItWorks.title: How VaultNode Works
howItWorks.subtitle: How VaultNode protects you in 3 movements

step1.title: Select Source
step1.desc: Drag your files into the vault. They are instantly loaded into your browser's private session RAM.

step2.title: Local Mutation
step2.desc: Our WebAssembly engine processes pixels and vectors locally. No data packets are sent to any server.

step3.title: Secure Export
step3.desc: Download your finalized documents. Once you close the tab, your data is permanently wiped from RAM.

visualProof.title: Visual Proof
visualProof.desc: Traditional redaction uses vector shapes that can easily be removed by hackers to reveal the original text. VaultNode destroys the underlying image pixels completely. What's gone is gone forever.

redactor.title: Secure PDF Redaction
redactor.desc: Traditional redaction uses vector shapes that can easily be removed by hackers to reveal the original text. VaultNode destroys the underlying image pixels completely. What's gone is gone forever.

compressor.title: Smart Image Compression
compressor.desc: Heavy images slow down your work and leak metadata. VaultNode compresses images locally, stripping EXIF data and reducing file size by up to 90% without visible quality loss.

merger.title: Local PDF Merging
merger.desc: Scattered documents are hard to manage. Merge unlimited PDFs directly in your browser without uploading sensitive files to cloud servers.

pdfToImg.title: PDF to Image Converter
pdfToImg.desc: Need a specific page from a PDF? VaultNode rasterizes PDF documents locally and extracts high-quality JPEGs directly in your browser. No server uploads required.

cleanExif.title: Metadata Scrubber
cleanExif.desc: Photos carry hidden GPS coordinates, camera models, and timestamps. VaultNode redraws your images pixel-by-pixel to permanently strip all invisible EXIF data.

password.title: Secure Key Generator
password.desc: Stop trusting server-side password generators. VaultNode uses your browser's native cryptographic engine to create ultra-secure passwords that never leave your device.

useCases.title: Global Compliance
useCases.subtitle: Architected for professionals who can't risk a leak

hr.title: HR Departments
hr.desc: Redact social security numbers and personal addresses from employee records before internal sharing.

legal.title: Legal Counsel
legal.desc: Blackout privileged information in discovery documents without leaving a digital vector trail behind.

journalists.title: Journalists
journalists.desc: Secure whistleblower sources by permanently removing metadata and identifiable visual information.

publicSector.title: Public Sector
publicSector.desc: Process citizen data in compliance with GDPR and CCPA using strictly local hardware execution.

compliance.title: Compliance Officers
compliance.desc: Audit high-risk documents in an air-gapped browser session with zero external dependencies.

agile.title: Agile Teams
agile.desc: Merge and optimize project assets fast without waiting for slow cloud uploads or processing queues.

Footer.desc: The world's most private local-only media tools. Powered by hardware-level execution.

redact.title: Secure PDF Redactor
redact.description: Permanently blackout sensitive information in PDFs. 100% client-side rasterization ensures zero-trace data removal.

compress.title: Smart Image Compressor
compress.description: Shrink images without data leaks. Fast, 100% local browser-side compression for JPG, PNG, and WebP.

pdfToImg.title: PDF to Image Converter
pdfToImg.description: Instantly convert PDF pages to high-quality JPG images directly in your browser. 100% local, secure, and fast.

cleanExif.title: Metadata Scrubber
cleanExif.description: Strip hidden GPS and EXIF data from your photos natively in your browser. Complete privacy without server uploads.

password.title: Secure Password Generator
password.description: Generate cryptographically secure passwords locally on your device using native browser APIs.

unlockPdf.title: PDF Unlocker
unlockPdf.description: Remove passwords and restrictions safely from trusted PDFs locally in your browser. No files uploaded.

heicToJpg.title: HEIC to JPG Converter
heicToJpg.description: Transform high-efficiency Apple HEIC photos into standard JPEG or WebP formats instantly with in-memory execution.

pdfToDocx.title: PDF to Word Converter
pdfToDocx.description: Extract readable text from PDFs and rebuild them as professional Word (.docx) documents securely.

textEncryptor.title: Text Encryptor
textEncryptor.description: Protect messages with hardware-accelerated AES-256-GCM encryption natively in your browser.

blurTool.title: Privacy Blur
blurTool.description: Obfuscate sensitive regions of your images locally with Gaussian filtering.

pdfSplit.title: Extract Pages
pdfSplit.description: Split PDF documents or extract specific ranges locally without cloud processing.

redact.dropDesc: Rasterized flattening permanently destroys underlying data for 100% security.
redact.securityWarning: Original text data will be permanently overwritten by rasterization at 3.0x density.

compress.dropDesc: JPG, PNG, WEBP. All processing happens 100% locally in your session.

pdfToImg.dropDesc: We'll rasterize the PDF pages into high-quality images directly in your browser.

cleanExif.dropDesc: We will redraw the pixels to permanently wipe hidden EXIF and GPS data.
cleanExif.noExifFound: No sensitive metadata found attached to this image.
cleanExif.safe: Image is clean and safe to share.

unlockPdf.dropDesc: We'll securely decrypt your PDF using your password within your browser.
unlockPdf.successDesc: Your document has been successfully decrypted and is ready to download.
unlockPdf.explainerText: Your bank password never leaves your keyboard. The PDF is decrypted locally in your browser's RAM without any server uploads.

heicToJpg.dropDesc: We will intelligently transcode your iPhone photos using standard WebAssembly loops.
heicToJpg.errorDesc: Failed to convert HEIC. The file may be corrupted.
heicToJpg.explainerText: HEIC formats are computationally heavy. We use WebAssembly to transcode them directly inside your browser's RAM, ensuring your photos are never sent to a cloud server.

pdfToDocx.dropDesc: We'll scrape the text layers and build a downloadable Word Document.
pdfToDocx.errorDesc: Failed to process PDF. Ensure it is not encrypted and contains text layers.
pdfToDocx.explainerText: We read your PDF's text layer and build the Word document entirely in your browser. Highly sensitive data never hits the network.

mediaConverter.dropDesc: We'll process your media using FFmpeg.wasm directly inside your browser's memory.
mediaConverter.explainerText: Converting video is intensive. We bring the power of FFmpeg to your browser via WebAssembly, so your media files never leave your device.

svgToPng.dropDesc: Rasterize vector files to PNG pixels using your native graphics engine.
svgToPng.explainerText: SVG files are code. We use a sandbox canvas to draw your vector graphics and export them as PNGs without any external processing.
